subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and His chosen ones, who are enraptured by His sweet fragrances! If ye would but pause to reflect upon the reality of things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله و اصفیائه و منجذبی نفحاته اگر قدری تفکر نمااید و در حقیقت امور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
